headline: Co-founder and managing partner focused on enterprise AI delivery and telecom transformation
title: Managing Partner
confidenceNote: Strong match on name, company, and Ligaments AI role; Dallas location comes from participant-provided data rather than public source evidence found.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and managing partner at Ligaments AI Company, working on composable enterprise AI solutions. Public company posts describe him as a telecom software and AI expert with nearly 20 years of experience in high-scale digital transformations and operations.

primary.note: Lists Arun as AI aficionado, co-founder, delivery/client partner, telecom domain expert at Ligaments AI Company.

primary.note: Announces joining Ligaments AI; company comment names him co-founder and managing partner.

secondary.note: Company page describes composable AI solutions for enterprise AI journeys and headquarters in Prosper, Texas.

headline: Principal product manager for Microsoft AI developer experience and Azure AI SDKs
title: Principal Product Manager
confidenceNote: Multiple primary/professional sources consistently identify Arun Sekhar as a Microsoft principal product manager working on AI developer experience and Azure AI SDKs.
bioMarkdown: Microsoft principal product manager focused on AI developer experience and Azure AI SDKs. His background spans developer, dev lead, and PM work across Microsoft technologies, with public speaking around Microsoft Reactor, Foundry Models, and AI application development.

primary.note: Lists principal product manager for AI Developer Experience at Microsoft.

primary.note: Lists principal product manager for AI Developer Experience, Microsoft affiliation, and Redmond location.

primary.note: Public profile references his role as principal PM for Azure AI SDKs.

secondary.note: Microsoft event page lists Arun Sekhar as a Microsoft principal product manager.

secondary.note: Speaker profile describes his Azure AI SDKs role and long Microsoft/cloud/devops background.

headline: Co-founder and COO building AI inference infrastructure at Aranya
title: COO
confidenceNote: Public LinkedIn, company, and press sources consistently identify Aryamika as Aranya co-founder/COO in San Francisco.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and COO at Aranya, an AI infrastructure company building cluster-scale systems for inference workloads. Her background includes an MIT Sloan MBA and product/community leadership around AI and technology events.

headline: Co-founder of Morphiq Labs, working on agent-facing developer tool discovery and benchmarks
title: Cofounder
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and Morphiq public pages align on name, role, company, and San Francisco location; less independent biographical depth was available.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder of Morphiq Labs, which studies and improves how coding agents discover, evaluate, and integrate developer tools. His recent work includes Morphiq Bench, benchmarking tool selection by agents such as Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor.

primary.label: Aryan Daga LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Aryan as co-founder at Morphiq Labs in San Francisco.

primary.note: Official company site describes Morphiq's agent-discovery and developer-tool benchmarking products.

primary.note: Founder post describes Morphiq Bench and the agent-as-user thesis.

secondary.note: Company page lists Morphiq Labs, its website, team size, and Aryan Daga among employees.

headline: Founding engineer at Arena focused on design engineering and AI/LLM product experiences
